product_model.description: [{"type":"text","text":"Dr.Lan Ginseng & Black Sesame Hair Serum","sub":[{"t":"Dr.Lan Ginseng & Black Sesame Hair Serum","h":1}]},{"type":"text","text":"Product Description","sub":[{"t":"Product Description","h":3}]},{"type":"text","text":"Dr.Lan Ginseng & Black Sesame Hair Serum is formulated with premium natural plant extracts, enriched with pure ginseng essence and nutrient-dense black sesame. Its lightweight, non-greasy formula is designed for daily scalp and hair care, helping you achieve healthier, naturally shiny hair with long-lasting fullness.","sub":[{"t":"Dr.Lan Ginseng & Black Sesame Hair Serum is formulated with premium natural plant extracts, enriched with pure ginseng essence and nutrient-dense black sesame. Its lightweight, non-greasy formula is designed for daily scalp and hair care, helping you achieve healthier, naturally shiny hair with long-lasting fullness."}]},{"type":"text","text":"Key products.title: 【Free Shipping!】Dr.Lan Salicylic Acid Facial Cleanser Set, For All Skin Types, Gentle Cleansing, Moisturizing, Oil Control, Enhances Skin Radiance, Gentle & Non-Irritating
Penghantaran Percuma! Syampu Rosemary, Rambut Segar & Licin, Menenangkan & Merawat Kulit Kepala, Rambut Gebu & Berkilat, Rambut Lembut & Elegan, Rambut Lebih Sihat, Sesuai untuk Lelaki & Wanita

Dr.Lan Krim Muka Pelembap Sarang Burung, Selesa dan Menenangkan Kulit, Pembersihan, Pelembap, Penghidratan, Kawalan Minyak, Kulit Tidak Tegang dan Kulit Muka Lega, Penjagaan Kulit Pembersihan Muka. Sesuai untuk Semua Jenis Kulit.

Kotak Hadiah Eksklusif | Pencuci Muka Asid Salisilik, Untuk Kulit Berjerawat, Kawalan Minyak, Berbuih Halus, Menyegarkan, Penjagaan Tekstur Kulit, Melembapkan & Menghidrat, Penjagaan Liang Pori, Mengimbangi Minyak
【Dr.Lan Original 】| Serum Rambut Ekstrak Ginseng & Biji Hitam | Membantu Rambut Lebih Lembut & Berisi, Melembapkan Kulit Kepala
Dr. Lan Radiance Pelindung Matahari SPF50+ 50g untuk Semua Jenis Kulit, Perlindungan Matahari yang Tahan Lama, Ringan dan Bernafas, Tidak Berminyak, Asas Solekan yang Menyegarkan, Tiada Sisa Berat
Dr.Lan Syampu | Pati Halia & Daun Seribu | Kawalan Minyak, Menambah Isipadu, Melicinkan Rambut, Menenangkan Kulit Kepala
Dr.Lan Pencuci Muka Asid Salisilik & Amino Asid, Segar & Kawalan Minyak, Pembersihan Lembut, Membantu Kulit Lebih Bersih & Licin, Sesuai Untuk Kulit Berminyak & Sensitif

Eksklusif Acara!Dr.Lan Niacinamide & Vitamin C - Meningkatkan Radiansi Kulit, Memberikan Kelembapan & Penutupan, Menenangkan & Melegakan Kulit, Menyokong Keseimbangan Minyak & Tampilan Kulit Lebih Jernih, Mengisi Semula Nutrisi Semula Jadi Kulit
